plugins.name: plugin-creator
plugins.description: Scaffolds new Claude Code plugins (agents, hooks, skills, commands) following the official Claude Code plugin guidelines.

plugins.name: amazon-doc-writer
plugins.description: Writes Amazon-style internal documents (PR/FAQ, technical design, mini design, analysis report, COE, OP1/OP2 narrative, WBR narrative) from a set of user-provided source files, following Amazon's narrative writing conventions.

plugins.name: autonomous-builder
plugins.description: Autonomously plans, implements, and reviews multi-step work in a codebase. An orchestrator agent drafts a phased plan with MoSCoW-prioritised acceptance criteria, gets the user's approval, then runs each task through an implementer and a reviewer with adaptive retry, plan revision, and per-phase user checkpoints. Phase Definition of Done supports `[Journey]` AC exercised against the running system by a `tester` subagent on three surfaces (CLI / HTTP API / web). Per-session reflector promotes durable codebase facts to `/memories/repo/autonomous-builder.md`; cross-session reflector mines recurring patterns. Hardened for large or legacy codebases via a shared Discoveries log.
